createAgent(string,string,uint8,address,.notice: Create a new agent with full config in one transaction.         Payable: sends msg.value (sFUEL) to delegate for gas.

fundAgent(uint256,uint256).notice: Fund an agent's USDC vault. Requires prior USDC approval.

submitPositionForAgent(uint256,uint256,b.notice: Submit an encrypted position using an agent's vault balance.         Can be called by the agent owner OR the agent's delegate address.

updateAgent(uint256,string,string,uint8,.notice: Update agent configuration. Only the owner can update.

withdrawFromAgent(uint256,uint256).notice: Withdraw USDC from an agent's vault back to the owner.
